tu.prop: In our model, surface runoff is included as a model parameter to account for (1) the introduction of MPW in riverine system during episodes of heavy rainfall10 and (2) the remobilization of deposited plastic particles during flood events31.

tuv.seg: Estimating monthly averaged catchment runoff
Estimation du ruissellement moyen mensuel du bassin versant

tu.prop: Monthly averaged catchment runoff in millimetres per day was calculated using GLDAS driving the NOAH Land Surface Model21.

tuv.seg: In our model, surface runoff is included as a model parameter to account for (1) the introduction of MPW in riverine system during episodes of heavy rainfall10 and (2) the remobilization of deposited plastic particles during flood events31.

Dans notre modèle, le ruissellement de surface est inclus comme paramètre du modèle pour tenir compte (1) de l'introduction de MPW dans le système fluvial lors d'épisodes de fortes précipitations et (2) de la remobilisation des particules de plastique déposées lors d'inondations.

tu.prop: In our model, surface runoff is included as a model parameter to account for (1) the introduction of MPW in riverine system during episodes of heavy rainfall10 and (2) the remobilization of deposited plastic particles during flood events31.
This land surface modelling system integrates data from advanced ground and space-based observation systems.

tuv.seg: Monthly averaged catchment runoff in millimetres per day was calculated using GLDAS driving the NOAH Land Surface Model21.
Le ruissellement mensuel moyen du bassin versant en millimètres par jour a été calculé à l'aide de GLDAS pilotant le modèle NOAH Land Surface Model.

tu.prop: Monthly averaged catchment runoff in millimetres per day was calculated using GLDAS driving the NOAH Land Surface Model21.
The model contains land surface parameters for vegetation, soil, elevation and slope.

tuv.seg: This land surface modelling system integrates data from advanced ground and space-based observation systems.
Ce système de modélisation de la surface terrestre intègre les données de systèmes avancés d’observation au sol et spatiaux.

tu.prop: This land surface modelling system integrates data from advanced ground and space-based observation systems.
The forcing data in the model are near-real-time satellite-derived precipitation and evaporation data (wind, radiation, temperature, humidity and surface pressure).

tuv.seg: The model contains land surface parameters for vegetation, soil, elevation and slope.
Le modèle contient des paramètres de surface terrestre tels que : la végétation, le sol, l'élévation et la pente.

tu.prop: The model contains land surface parameters for vegetation, soil, elevation and slope.
The model computes the daily surface and subsurface runoff globally on ¼ degree resolution, by solving terrestrial water and energy budgets21.

tuv.seg: The forcing data in the model are near-real-time satellite-derived precipitation and evaporation data (wind, radiation, temperature, humidity and surface pressure).
Les données de forçage du modèle sont des données de précipitations et d'évaporation dérivées des satellites en temps quasi réel (vent, rayonnement, température, humidité et pression de surface).

tu.prop: The forcing data in the model are near-real-time satellite-derived precipitation and evaporation data (wind, radiation, temperature, humidity and surface pressure).
Subsurface runoff consists of water that infiltrates into the soil and flows to a water body by groundwater flow.

tuv.seg: The model computes the daily surface and subsurface runoff globally on ¼ degree resolution, by solving terrestrial water and energy budgets21.
Le modèle calcule le ruissellement quotidien de surface et souterrain à l’échelle mondiale avec une résolution de ¼ de degré, en résolvant les bilans hydriques et énergétiques terrestres.

tu.prop: The model computes the daily surface and subsurface runoff globally on ¼ degree resolution, by solving terrestrial water and energy budgets21.
Surface runoff occurs either when the rainfall exceeds the infiltration capacity of the soil or when the soil is saturated with groundwater.

tuv.seg: Subsurface runoff consists of water that infiltrates into the soil and flows to a water body by groundwater flow.
Le ruissellement souterrain est constitué d'eau qui s'infiltre dans le sol et s'écoule vers un plan d'eau par l'écoulement des eaux souterraines.

tu.prop: Subsurface runoff consists of water that infiltrates into the soil and flows to a water body by groundwater flow.
Monthly and yearly averages are calculated over the period 2005–2015.

tuv.seg: Surface runoff occurs either when the rainfall exceeds the infiltration capacity of the soil or when the soil is saturated with groundwater.
Le ruissellement de surface se produit soit lorsque les précipitations dépassent la capacité d'infiltration du sol, soit lorsque le sol est saturé d'eau souterraine.

tu.prop: Surface runoff occurs either when the rainfall exceeds the infiltration capacity of the soil or when the soil is saturated with groundwater.
The surface and subsurface runoff are summed and subsequently averaged per catchment area22.

tuv.seg: Monthly and yearly averages are calculated over the period 2005–2015.
Les moyennes mensuelles et annuelles sont calculées sur la période 2005-2015.

tu.prop: Monthly and yearly averages are calculated over the period 2005–2015.
A better correlation was found with estimated flux inputs from observational studies when considering monthly averaged runoff instead of the yearly average (Table 4).

tuv.seg: The surface and subsurface runoff are summed and subsequently averaged per catchment area22.
Les ruissellements de surface et souterrains sont additionnés puis moyennés par bassin versant.

tu.prop: The surface and subsurface runoff are summed and subsequently averaged per catchment area22.
Therefore, monthly averaged catchment runoff corresponding to sampling event month was considered while calibrating our model to account for temporal variations and seasonality of inputs.

tuv.seg: A better correlation was found with estimated flux inputs from observational studies when considering monthly averaged runoff instead of the yearly average (Table 4).

Une meilleure corrélation a été trouvée avec les apports de flux estimés à partir d'études observationnelles lorsque l'on considère le ruissellement moyen mensuel au lieu de la moyenne annuelle (tableau 4).

tu.prop: A better correlation was found with estimated flux inputs from observational studies when considering monthly averaged runoff instead of the yearly average (Table 4).
The main motivation behind using runoff data from GLDAS is the provision of land surface processes including runoff estimates at a global level.

tuv.seg: Therefore, monthly averaged catchment runoff corresponding to sampling event month was considered while calibrating our model to account for temporal variations and seasonality of inputs.

Par conséquent, le ruissellement moyen mensuel du bassin versant correspondant au mois de l’événement d’échantillonnage a été pris en compte lors du calibrage de notre modèle pour tenir compte des variations temporelles et de la saisonnalité des apports.

tu.prop: Therefore, monthly averaged catchment runoff corresponding to sampling event month was considered while calibrating our model to account for temporal variations and seasonality of inputs.

Nonetheless, it is important to notice that comparisons between river discharge predictions from GLDAS and observations in 66 basins worldwide43 demonstrated that predictions are somewhat dryer than observations.

tuv.seg: The main motivation behind using runoff data from GLDAS is the provision of land surface processes including runoff estimates at a global level.

La principale motivation derrière l'utilisation des données de ruissellement du GLDAS est la fourniture de processus de surface terrestre, y compris des estimations du ruissellement au niveau mondial.

tu.prop: The main motivation behind using runoff data from GLDAS is the provision of land surface processes including runoff estimates at a global level.
The authors of this validation study attributed the differences to uncertainties in precipitation rates.

tuv.seg: Nonetheless, it is important to notice that comparisons between river discharge predictions from GLDAS and observations in 66 basins worldwide43 demonstrated that predictions are somewhat dryer than observations.

Néanmoins, il est important de noter que les comparaisons entre les prévisions de débit fluvial du GLDAS et les observations dans 66 bassins à travers le monde ont démontré que les prévisions sont quelque peu plus sèches que les observations.

tu.prop: Nonetheless, it is important to notice that comparisons between river discharge predictions from GLDAS and observations in 66 basins worldwide43 demonstrated that predictions are somewhat dryer than observations.

As our framework relies on intra-annual variability, the NOAH land surface model predictions, forced with GLDAS, were still in good agreement with seasonal variations measurements with a predicted date of maximum discharge within 20 days of observed annual discharge peak date for most rivers covered in the GLDAS validation study.

tuv.seg: The authors of this validation study attributed the differences to uncertainties in precipitation rates.
Les auteurs de cette étude de validation ont attribué ces différences aux incertitudes liées aux taux de précipitations.

tu.prop: The authors of this validation study attributed the differences to uncertainties in precipitation rates.

tuv.seg: As our framework relies on intra-annual variability, the NOAH land surface model predictions, forced with GLDAS, were still in good agreement with seasonal variations measurements with a predicted date of maximum discharge within 20 days of observed annual discharge peak date for most rivers covered in the GLDAS validation study.

Comme notre cadre repose sur la variabilité intra-annuelle, les prévisions du modèle de surface terrestre NOAH, forcées avec GLDAS, étaient toujours en bon accord avec les mesures de variations saisonnières avec une date prévue du débit maximum dans les 20 jours suivant la date de pointe du débit annuel observé pour la plupart des rivières couvertes dans l’étude de validation GLDAS.

tu.prop: As our framework relies on intra-annual variability, the NOAH land surface model predictions, forced with GLDAS, were still in good agreement with seasonal variations measurements with a predicted date of maximum discharge within 20 days of observed annual discharge peak date for most rivers covered in the GLDAS validation study.
The authors declare that the main data supporting the findings of this study are available within the article and its Supplementary Information.

Disponibilité des données

tuv.seg: The authors declare that the main data supporting the findings of this study are available within the article and its Supplementary Information.

tu.prop: The authors declare that the main data supporting the findings of this study are available within the article and its Supplementary Information.

Les entrées et sorties du modèle mondial pour les estimations inférieures, médianes et supérieures et pour les 40 760 bassins versants considérés dans cette étude ont été déposées au format de données vectorielles géospatiales pour le logiciel de système d'information géographique (SIG) sur figshare avec l'identifiant doi:10.6084/m9.figshare. 4725541.
